name: Hourly to Salary Calculator
description: Convert hourly wage into annual salary based on hours per week and work weeks per year.
formula: Annual Salary = hourly wage * hours per week * weeks per year
formulaDescription: Estimates salary from an hourly rate based on work hours and weeks per year.

faqs.question: Does this account for vacation?
faqs.answer: No, it assumes full weeks worked; adjust weeks per year for vacation.
